news_items.headline: Chris Sale tallies 11 strikeouts, Dominic Smith hits 3-run homer in Braves' 6-5 win over Padres
news_items.summary: San Diego took an early 3-0 lead over Chris Sale, helped by a misplay from the Braves' Mauricio Dubón in left field.

news_items.headline: Pirates enter crucial Cubs series with wild card hopes very top of mind
news_items.summary: The Pirates are 53-50 and a half-game back of the final wild card spot in the National League.

news_items.headline: Unflappable as ever, Phillies co-ace Zack Wheeler is having the best season of his career
news_items.summary: Wheeler, an All-Star snub and Cy Young contender, has a career-best 2.16 ERA across 100 frames, despite not having made his season debut until April 25.
